query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "many-shot cot-icl: making in-context learning truly learn" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) as it investigates the same core mechanism (Chain-of-Thought reasoning in LLMs) and addresses the same underlying problem of error propagation and robustness that the user's question regarding "Many-Shot CoT-ICL" implies, even though it proposes a diffusion-based solution rather than a many-shot in-context learning one. It also fits criterion (f) as it belongs to the canonical alternative-vocabulary cluster for improving CoT reasoning (e.g., "error accumulation
